name: Hugging Face Inference API
what_it_does: The world's largest open-source model hub with a serverless Inference API for running 250k+ models including LLMs, embeddings, image generation, and specialized NLP tasks via a unified REST interface.
use_cases: Running open-source LLM inference (Llama, Mistral, Falcon) without managing GPU infrastructure
Generating embeddings from specialized sentence-transformer models for RAG
Fine-tuned model inference for domain-specific classification, NER, or summarization
Image generation, classification, and object detection via serverless endpoints
Text-to-speech and automatic speech recognition with open models
not_for: Production workloads requiring guaranteed latency SLAs (cold starts on free tier)
Very large model inference requiring custom VRAM configurations
Teams that need dedicated, isolated GPU infrastructure (use Dedicated Endpoints instead)
best_when: You need to run open-source models without managing GPU infrastructure, especially for specialized tasks where open models outperform general-purpose commercial APIs.
avoid_when: You need OpenAI-level reliability guarantees, very low latency, or your model doesn't fit in the serverless tier.

auth.notes: User access tokens with scoped permissions (read, write, inference). Tokens can be restricted to specific organizations. Fine-grained tokens available for least-privilege access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free tier: rate-limited inference on many models (cold starts, shared infrastructure)
pricing.paid_tiers: PRO $9/month for faster inference; Dedicated Endpoints from ~$0.06/hour; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Free Inference API is heavily rate-limited and has cold starts. PRO unlocks faster access. Dedicated Endpoints are billed per GPU-hour and are production-grade.

performance.rate_limits: Free: ~30 requests/hour; PRO: higher limits; Dedicated: no limits

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Errors include error field with description and estimated_time for model loading. 503 with estimated_time is common for cold starts. Documentation sometimes lags model updates.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Inference is stateless and effectively idempotent. No persistent state across calls.
known_agent_gotchas: Model cold start: first request after idle period returns 503 with estimated_time — must implement retry with backoff
Model-specific input formats vary widely — agents must read model cards before calling a model
Some models require Pro subscription or gate access (gated models require explicit approval)
Free Inference API may be deprecated or rate-limited for certain models — check model page for availability
Response format differs by task (text-generation vs feature-extraction vs fill-mask) — no unified schema
Dedicated Endpoints have separate URLs and credentials from the shared Inference API
